plan.title: Radio Soundtracks Station Visibility Regression
plan.objective: Restore expected Radio station visibility so users can reliably access the Soundtracks station when their library contains enough soundtrack tracks.
in_scope: Make the Soundtracks station render when qualifying data exists
Radio station list includes Soundtracks again in expected conditions
out_of_scope: Do not redesign the Radio screen, do not change unrelated station ordering, and do not alter backend radio queue generation rules unless required for this specific visibility bug.

tasks.summary: Add regression test and implement Soundtracks station visibility fix in radio station source/filter path
acceptance_criteria: No new lint/type errors introduced in touched files
tasks.outcome: Pinned qualifying soundtrack genres into the featured radio genre set so Soundtracks remains visible when over threshold. | Extracted genre-selection logic into a reusable utility used by LibraryRadioStations.

pre_spec_outline.purpose_goals: Restore expected Radio station visibility so users can reliably access the Soundtracks station when their library contains enough soundtrack tracks.
pre_spec_outline.non_goals: Do not redesign the Radio screen, do not change unrelated station ordering, and do not alter backend radio queue generation rules unless required for this specific visibility bug.

spec_outline.summary: Investigate and fix the regression that removed Soundtracks from Radio station cards while preserving existing station gating behavior and user expectations.

full_spec_outline.objective: Make the Soundtracks station render when qualifying data exists
full_spec_outline.deliverable: Radio station list includes Soundtracks again in expected conditions
acceptance_criteria: Soundtracks station appears when the source track count threshold is met
No unrelated stations disappear as a side effect
Regression coverage captures the station filtering behavior

refined_spec.summary: Primary hypothesis is frontend filtering or station configuration drift. Confirm source of truth and add focused tests before final implementation.

full_refined_spec.decision: Enforce explicit inclusion contract for Soundtracks in station definitions and filtering logic
full_refined_spec.rationale: The issue is a user-facing regression on station discoverability, so a stable inclusion contract plus targeted tests prevents repeat breakage.
acceptance_criteria: A failing test first reproduces missing Soundtracks
Updated tests pass in targeted run

implementation_plan.summary: 1) Add failing test for Soundtracks visibility, 2) patch station filtering/configuration, 3) run targeted verification.

steps.deliverable: Add regression test and implement Soundtracks station visibility fix in radio station source/filter path
acceptance_criteria: No new lint/type errors introduced in touched files

delivered: Pinned qualifying soundtrack genres into the featured radio genre set so Soundtracks remains visible when over threshold.
Extracted genre-selection logic into a reusable utility used by LibraryRadioStations.
